ddls:
CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the family member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the family member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the family member */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to other family members (e.g., Son, Father, Mother, Brother, Sister) */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job the family member is currently holding */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle currently assigned to the family member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the family member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the family member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the family member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle (e.g., KTM Duke, Innova) */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle type (e.g., Bike, Car) */,
  "vehicle_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was purchased */,
  "insurance_validity" TEXT /* Date until which the vehicle insurance is valid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job (e.g., Tech executive, Real estate) */,
  "job_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job category (e.g., Technology, Real Estate) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the job is held */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "job_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the job started */,
  "job_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the job ended (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_job_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family member */,
  "related_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related family member */,
  "relationship_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship type (e.g., Parent, Child, Sibling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_relationship_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_type_id") REFERENCES relationship_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being assigned */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family member the vehicle is being assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was assigned */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES family_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job change */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new job */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family member whose job is being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the job change occurred */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the job change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_changes_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES family_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_changes_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., family administrator, parent, child) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family member being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the family data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the family data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES family_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., Bike, Car) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category (e.g., Technology, Real Estate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationship_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship type (e.g., Parent, Child, Sibling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
